ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "specimen_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the specimen */,
  "year" REAL /* Year of collection in AD */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Depth coordinate in cm */,
  "ms" REAL /* Magnetic susceptibility in Am^2/kg */,
  "mr" REAL /* Remanent magnetization in Am/kg */,
  "bc" REAL /* Magnetic field strength in mT */,
  "bcr" REAL /* Residual magnetic field strength in mT */,
  "xhf" REAL /* Volume magnetic susceptibility in m3/kg */,
  "hirm" REAL /* High-temperature remanent magnetization in Am2/kg */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the specimen was collected */,
  "specimen_type" TEXT /* Type of specimen (e.g., rock, sediment) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the specimen */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the specimen */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the specimen is processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_location" TEXT /* Location of the geological site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site's geological features */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinates of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinates of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "geological_age" TEXT /* Estimated geological age of the site */,
  "geological_layer" TEXT /* Layer or stratum from which specimens are collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Magnetic Susceptibility) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., Am^2/kg, mT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of values that can be expected from this type of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the data quality (e.g., 'High', 'Medium', 'Low') */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person who conducted the quality assessment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., Statistical Analysis) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results or findings from the analysis */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who conducted the analysis */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project under which the analysis is performed */,
  "analysis_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or area of expertise */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the analyst */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the analyst is affiliated with */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications or qualifications of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project objectives */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_specimens" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the specimen in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_specimens_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_specimens_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen being experimented on */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "setup_details" TEXT /* Detailed setup of the experiment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or results from the experiment */,
  "experiment_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the experiment */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the experiment */,
  "experiment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., Cloud, Local Server) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the repository */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the repository */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the repository (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., laptop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
